summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dashboard Rating Cards and Feedback History Modal feature. All 7 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing confirms all features working: clickable rating cards, feedback history modals for both peer and coach sessions, star icons in brand purple/periwinkle color (rgb(140, 157, 255)), modal close functionality via Escape key and clicking outside.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console) - not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: RatingDisplay component correctly implements clickable cards with cursor-pointer and hover effects
FeedbackHistoryModal component properly displays session details including partner/mentor name, date, rating, and comments
Star icons use brand periwinkle color (--gn-periwinkle: #8C9DFF) via CSS variables
Backend dashboard-summary endpoint correctly returns peer_sessions_with_feedback and coach_sessions_with_feedback arrays
Modal can be closed by clicking outside (onOpenChange) or pressing Escape key
Hover text 'Click to view feedback →' appears on rating cards as expected
seed_data_creation: Test user has 1 peer session with feedback (avg 4.3) and 1 coaching session with feedback (avg 4.5) - data already exists in test_database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard rating cards feature fully tested and working. Test user 'testdash@gradnext.co' has feedback data for both peer and coach sessions. Star icons confirmed to use brand purple/periwinkle color (rgb(140, 157, 255)). Welcome tour modal appears on first login - dismiss with Escape key before testing rating cards.

GET /api/resources/dashboard-summary.details: Returns stats with avg_peer_rating, avg_coach_rating, peer_sessions_with_feedback, coach_sessions_with_feedback

elements_verified: Average Peer Rating card displays 4.3 with 1 review
Average Coach Rating card displays 4.5 with 1 review
Star icons in brand purple/periwinkle color (rgb(140, 157, 255))
Cards are clickable with cursor-pointer style
Hover effect shows 'Click to view feedback →' text
Comment: 'Great communication skills! Worked well through the case.'
Comment: 'Excellent progress! Shows strong fundamentals in case solving.'
Areas to Improve: 'Work on mental math speed'

interactions_tested.click_peer_rating_card: PASS - Opens Peer Session Feedback modal
interactions_tested.click_coach_rating_card: PASS - Opens Coach Session Feedback modal
interactions_tested.close_modal_escape: PASS - Modal closes on Escape key
interactions_tested.close_modal_click_outside: PASS - Modal closes when clicking outside

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB data from test_database

star_icon_color_verification.status: PASS - Brand purple/periwinkle color correctly applied
